# komodo_api_key (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo API key by key ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_api_key" "by_key" {
  key = "K-EDXr0hotlGVGIM67mPSXpPpkvp3j6e92fxybUsNJ"
}

data "komodo_api_key" "by_name" {
  name = "my-api-key"
}

# Look up an API key belonging to a service user
data "komodo_api_key" "svc_key" {
  name            = "ci-key"
  service_user_id = komodo_service_user.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `key` (String) The API key identifier (e.g. `K-...`). If set alongside `name`, takes precedence.
- `name` (String) The human-friendly name of the API key.
- `service_user_id` (String) When set, searches within the API keys of the specified service user.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation time in RFC3339 format.
- `expires_at` (String) Expiration time in RFC3339 format. Empty string means no expiration.
- `user_id` (String) The ID of the user who owns this key.
